message:
chore(meta): sync beads issue tracker and audit index

- Update .beads/issues.jsonl with latest closed audit issues
  (broadcast subscribe lock contention, routing source pattern
  validation, TcpSocket reuseaddr/reuseport test updates)
- Append 5 new entries to audit_index.jsonl for recently audited
  files from batch 30223 and subsequent audit cycles

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
